title: Pabstiella fasciata
taxonomy: Pabstiella fasciata is classified as a species of orchid within the Pabstiella genus. It belongs to the subtribe Pleurothallidinae, which is part of the family Orchidaceae. The Pabstiella genus itself is a group of orchids native to the Americas. The Pabstiella fasciata is a terrestrial orchid, meaning it grows in the ground. Its classification is further specified in the taxonomic hierarchy as Pabstiella fasciata (Barb. Rodr.) Barb. Rodr.
